description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure with an exaggeratedly elongated arm span, standing upright and wearing minimal clothing. The figure has a well-defined muscular torso, visible pectoral and abdominal muscles, and is dressed in short, fitted shorts. The head features medium-length, wavy hair, and the facial features are proportionate to the body. The arms are extended horizontally to the sides, far beyond natural human proportions, giving the figure a surreal appearance. The legs are straight and anatomically correct, with feet positioned close together. The overall surface appears smooth and matte, with realistic human skin texture and subtle anatomical details.
description: A stylized adult male figure with extremely elongated arms, standing upright in fitted shorts and medium-length wavy hair. The body is muscular and the surface is smooth and matte.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muscular torso, face, and the full horizontal extension of the elongated arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the extreme length of the arm and the profile of the head and torso.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back muscles, hair, and the full extension of the arms from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the arm's length and the profile of the body and head.
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
